title: Koopman Mini Glass Jars with Cork Stoppers 6 Pack 80ml Spice Jar Cork Lids Square Clear Glass Kitchen Food Storage Cork Jar Bottles for Spices Seasoning Herbs Tea Jam Honey DIY Crafts Wedding Favours
features: A set of mini/small glass jars designed to store small quantities of kitchen ingredients. Crafted from transparent glass with cork stopper lids, these kitchen storage jars will preserve small quantities of foods such as spices, herbs, seasonings, salt, pepper, and more.
These Glass Storage Jars come as a Set of 6. The MAXIMUM CAPACITY of Each Jar is 80ml. Dimensions of Each Jar are – Length: 4.5cm x Width: 4.5cm x Height: 8.2cm.

PRACTICAL MINI JAR - Moulded into a soft square shape, this mini jar features an airtight cork stopper, making it convenient for storing various kitchen ingredients. The transparent glass structure allows for quick identification of ingredients, facilitating easy storage and distinction between different items.

STORE, PRESERVE AND SERVE – User friendly mini jar equipped with a reliable cork stopper lid, providing a snug fit to maintain the freshness and flavour of ingredients for longer while offering a vintage appearance. From dry ingredients like powders to jams, chutney, pickles and more; these jar bottles will the perfect asset in your kitchen.

DURABLE MINI GLASS BUILD – For long term use and durability, this storage jar is crafted from high-quality glass. The high-quality glass with a made-to-last polished finish will make this glass jar bottle highly durable and resistant to common forms of damage, i.e. cracks/chips/scratches, making it a long-lasting tool within your kitchen.
